description: R1a L2 feature vectors. Each vector's expectedFeatures was computed by the REAL al-sem L2 (indexWorkspace, pre-resolve → projectFeatures). Hand-authored invariants were asserted against the live projection before emit. Rust loads this committed file and asserts parity.

vectors.name: a_mixed_kind_body
vectors.description: record-ops + commit get op0..opN-1 in visit order; callsites get op{N+i} post-visit; mixed OperationSiteKind
invariants: record-op + commit + error-call OperationSites all carry op{n} ids
callsite operationIds are numbered AFTER all record/commit/error op ids
a commit OperationSite exists
an error-call OperationSite exists

vectors.name: b_expression_info_kinds
vectors.description: unary -1, parenthesized ('s'), enum member, string concat, quoted field name, literal vs identifier
invariants: SetRange quoted field name yields quoted_identifier kind
unary -1 arg classifies as unary_expression with value set
enum member arg classifies as qualified_enum_value
parenthesized arg classifies as parenthesized_expression
identifier arg classifies as identifier

vectors.name: c_binding_source_kinds
vectors.description: parameter / local / global / implicit-rec / expression / unknown source kinds
invariants: parameter-sourced arg binds sourceKind=parameter
local record-var arg binds sourceKind=local
unknown identifier binds sourceKind=unknown with no name
literal arg binds sourceKind=expression
NO binding carries calleeParameterIsVar/bindingResolution/sourceTableId

vectors.name: d_result_use_contexts
vectors.description: bare Codeunit.Run (discarded) vs if Codeunit.Run (consumed); resultConsumed floor vs objectRunReturnUsed strict
invariants: bare object-run: resultConsumed=false
bare object-run: objectRunReturnUsed=false
if-condition object-run: resultConsumed=true
assignment-RHS object-run: objectRunReturnUsed=true

vectors.name: e_under_asserterror
vectors.description: callsite + error-call under asserterror carry underAsserterror; calls outside do not
invariants: Error callsite under asserterror is flagged
error-call OperationSite under asserterror is flagged
record-op outside asserterror is NOT flagged

vectors.name: f_variable_initializer_shadowing
vectors.description: initializer one-hop ValueSource; global vs local shadowing (local wins in features.variables)
invariants: local 'shadowed' (Text) shadows the global (Integer) — first match wins
variables carry scope + declaredType, NOT tableId

vectors.name: g_unreachable_after_exit
vectors.description: exit / bare Error / CurrReport.Quit make the next sibling unreachable
invariants: one unreachableStatement with exitKind=exit

vectors.name: h_field_vs_op_vs_call
vectors.description: Cust.Amount (field access) vs Cust.FindSet (record op) vs Helper.Send (member call)
invariants: Cust.Amount is a fieldAccess
Cust.FindSet is a record-op (not a callsite)
Client.Clear (HttpClient) is a callsite, not a record-op

vectors.name: i_nested_call_op_tie
vectors.description: Helper(Cust.Get()) and Helper(C).FindSet() — nested call/op keyed by node.id, distinct ids
invariants: Cust.Get() inner op is registered as a distinct record-op
Helper(...) is a callsite
chained Helper2(C).FindSet — FindSet on a call-expr receiver is a member CALLSITE, not a record-op
inner Helper2(C) receiver call is registered as its own bare callsite

vectors.name: j_utf16_column
vectors.description: a non-ASCII char before a token shifts the UTF-16 column by 1 code unit (not byte count)
invariants: FindSet record-op startColumn reflects UTF-16 (single unit for é)

vectors.name: k_raw_text_edges
vectors.description: doubled '' inside a string literal; non-ASCII quoted identifier field name
invariants: doubled-quote string literal text is source-faithful
non-ASCII quoted identifier field name preserved

vectors.name: l_repeat_condleaf_placement
vectors.description: repeat ... until Cust.Next()=0 — the until-condition op is harvested into the repeat node's conditionLeaves (structural CFN shape only; NOT derived execution order)
invariants: a repeat CFN node exists with a Next() op leaf in conditionLeaves

vectors.name: m_loop_nesting_depth
vectors.description: nested loops → nestingDepth=2; inner record-op carries both loop ids in loopStack
invariants: nestingDepth = 2
inner Modify op carries TWO loop ids

vectors.name: n_cfn_skeleton_all_kinds
vectors.description: if(+else)/case/while/for/repeat produce the expected CFN node kinds + child/else structure
invariants: top-level block holds if/case/while/for/repeat children in order
if node has elseChildren populated
case node has case-branch children
